870.reason: [Using PreParser.start() modifies the lookahead position but doesn't properly reset it, causing token stream misalignment; also, PreParser.start() returns the current token after parsing an LVal-like structure, not the next token which should be checked for ASSIGN]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [Using PreParser.start() modifies the lookahead position but doesn't properly reset it, causing token stream misalignment; also, PreParser.start() returns the current token after parsing an LVal-like structure, not the next token which should be checked for ASSIGN]
